laws.title: District Improvement Act (DIA)
laws.chronology_conclusion: Repealed history only; no Code operation survives into the live sequence.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: No Code operation authorized; retained as repealed public-law history only.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Absent from current branch XML; origin/main likewise has no Code insertion.

laws.title: The Federal Pay Standardization Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Earlier pay-table enactment in the shared 5 U.S.C. 5332 sequence; it is the upstream anchor for the later pay-law overlap with PL-034-241.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: Already incorporated at /us/usc/t5/s5332; no new amendment command is needed.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch already contains the integrated 5 U.S.C. 5332 text; origin/main does not.

laws.title: Literally Introducing Taxes (LIT)
laws.chronology_conclusion: Integrated tax rewrite; the live branch already carries the replacement tax text and history note.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: Pub. L. 32-233, Sec. 5, repeals and replaces 26 U.S.C. 1 with a flat 20 percent individual tax.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch contains the 26 U.S.C. 1 rewrite and statutory-history note; origin/main lacks the integrated change.

laws.title: Intelligence Appointment Transparency and Oversight Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Current and already integrated at the Title 50 target; no chronology conflict is present in the batch.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: Already incorporated at /us/usc/t50/s3041; the branch keeps the subsection (d) material and the revised subsection (b)(2) treatment.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch contains the Title 50 amendment; origin/main does not.

laws.title: Command Responsibility And Noncompliance Enforcement (CRANE) Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Non-Code enactment only; no executable Code target is approved.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: No Code operation authorized; retain as non-Code public-law history only.
laws.current_xml_comparison: No XML insertion is expected or present in the current branch or origin/main.

laws.title: Military Operational Authority Reform Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Integrated military rewrite; the current branch already carries the 10 U.S.C. 153 and 154 changes.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: Pub. L. 32-236, Secs. 4-5, add subsection (e) to 10 U.S.C. 153 and revise 10 U.S.C. 154 with the new operational-authority and function language.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch contains the amended Title 10 sections; origin/main does not.

laws.title: Conference Oversight of Discipline and Ethics Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: General and permanent, but still awaiting the classified statutory note at the Title 28 anchor.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: SEC. 3 is to be preserved as a statutory note at /us/usc/t28/s526.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch still lacks the note at 28 U.S.C. 526; origin/main lacks it too.
laws.final_recommended_action: Add the statutory note at 28 U.S.C. 526.

laws.title: Judicial Recall Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Temporary or self-expiring history only; no Code insertion is approved.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: No Code operation authorized; retain as public-law history only.
laws.current_xml_comparison: No XML insertion is expected or present in the current branch or origin/main.

laws.title: Literally Fixing Taxes
laws.chronology_conclusion: Repealed/superseded history only; the branch already retains it as a statutory-history note in 26 U.S.C. 1.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: Pub. L. 34-240, Sec. 4, would amend the LIT tax rate to 28 percent, but the law itself is repealed/superseded and stays historical only.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch preserves only the statutory-history note; origin/main does likewise.

laws.title: Protecting Working Americans
laws.chronology_conclusion: This enactment sits in the same pay-table chronology cluster as PL-032-232 on the 5 U.S.C. 5332 sequence, but the authenticated codification report still classifies it as a statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 29.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: SEC. 3 revises Section 5(a) of the Federal Executive and Senior Leadership Pay Standardization Act of 2025; codification keeps it as a statutory note at /us/usc/t2/s29.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch lacks the classified note at 2 U.S.C. 29; origin/main lacks it too.
laws.final_recommended_action: Add the statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 29.

laws.title: Public Law 34-242 | Federal Courthouse Security & Jurisdiction Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: General and permanent, but still uncodified at the classified Title 28 note anchor.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: SEC. 3 is to be preserved as a statutory note at /us/usc/t28/s362.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch still lacks the note at 28 U.S.C. 362; origin/main lacks it too.
laws.final_recommended_action: Add the statutory note at 28 U.S.C. 362.

laws.title: Public Law 34-243 | Judicial Integrity & Accountability Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Direct chapter-level rewrite already carried in the branch; no further chronological adjustment is needed.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: Pub. L. 34-243, Sec. 3, replaces Title 28 chapter 16 and its affected sections.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch includes the replacement chapter 16 framework; origin/main lacks the rewrite.
laws.final_recommended_action: No further Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 34-244 | Sentencing Reform Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Direct Title 18 amendment already integrated; no chronology conflict remains in the branch.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch includes the amended commencement and prior-custody-credit language; origin/main lacks the change.
laws.final_recommended_action: No further Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 34-245 | Legal Compensation Act
laws.chronology_conclusion: Mixed enactment: one direct Title 18 rewrite and one repeal-with-note package, both already reflected in the branch.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_exact_amendment_co: Pub. L. 34-245, Sec. 3, rewrites 18 U.S.C. 3006A(d) and repeals 42 U.S.C. chapter 34 subchapter X with the supporting note material.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch contains both the subsection rewrite and the subchapter repeal/note; origin/main lacks the package.
laws.final_recommended_action: No further Code change is required.

laws.current_xml_comparison: Current branch contains the revised commission provisions and repeal markings; origin/main lacks the changes.
laws.final_recommended_action: No further Code change is required.
